calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-29-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-10-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir S. Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Theresa Ketchum, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Allis-Chalmers Corporation Product Liability Trust.
Default was entered against defendant on May 26, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed September 9, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed August 31, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Theresa Ketchum, and against the Defaulted Defendant Allis-Chalmers Corporation Product Liability Trust as follows:

Principal - $49,000.00.
Interest - $4,188.
Costs - $382.85, for a total judgment in the amount of $53,571.34.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2009 Continued To Oct-13-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-22-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-27-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
